dj_text: Alright, "Sono Chi No Kioku ~ End Of The World" - Medieval Style [BardCore] JoJo's Bizarre Adventure OP 4. Let's tone it down a notch. Or seven. Here's Wind of Change (Medieval Cover). Down to the final track after this one.
recovery_text: Someone's been poking holes in reality. I'm looking at you, chat.
title: Wind of Change (Medieval Cover)
